reference:
xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="urn:oasis:names:tc:dita:xsd:reference.xsd"> Common DITA Elements This reference lists frequently used DITA Elements and their purposes.
Felicity Brand
dimensions
Simpletable Example
Element Description
p paragraph element
note Displays important information
